SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement

Class JkModuleId

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.JkModuleId
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparator<JkModuleId>
public final class JkModuleId extends Object implements Comparator<JkModuleId>
Identify a module (such as Google Guava). in a binary repository (such as a Maren repository). The module is identified by a group and a name which are both mandatory. Each module have generally many versions, and each version may contain many artifacts (which are identified using
invalid @link 
{@link JkCoordinate).
}

  • Method Details

    • of

      public static JkModuleId of(String group, String name)
      Creates a module id according the specified group and name.

    • of

      public static JkModuleId of(String moduleId)
      Creates a module id according a string supposed to be formatted as group.name or group: name. The last '.' is considered as the separator between the group and the name.
      If there is no '.' then the whole string will serve both for group and name.

    • getGroup

      public String getGroup()
      Group of this module.

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Name of this module.

    • getDotNotation

      public String getDotNotation()
      A concatenation of the group and name of the module as '[group].[name]'.

    • toColonNotation

      public String toColonNotation()
      A concatenation of the group and name of this module as '[group]:[value]'.

    • toCoordinate

      public JkCoordinate toCoordinate(String version)
      Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with the specified version.

    • toCoordinate

      public JkCoordinate toCoordinate(JkVersion version)
      Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with the specified version.

    • toCoordinate

      public JkCoordinate toCoordinate()
      Creates a JkCoordinate from this moduleId with unspecified version.
